name: Mimicry
short_description: A terrifying online horror game where one player becomes an impostor monster. Disguise, hunt, and destroy your friends — or work together to survive. Mimicry is a fast-paced, multiplayer fun game full of deception, fear, and chaos.
detailed_description:
🎮 Mimicry – Multiplayer horror where anyone could be the monster. Can you help or kill your friends?

Enter a chilling game of deception and survival in Mimicry, an online co-op horror experience for up to 9 players. One of you is infected by a mysterious alien parasite and can transform into any other player—or a terrifying monster.

🎭 As the impostor monster, your goal is to eliminate the squad while blending in with the group. Use disguise, stealth, and deadly power to avoid detection.

🧠 As a survivor, you must work with others, solve tasks, and escape… without trusting anyone too much. One wrong move and your friend might become your killer.

🔑 Key Features:

  • 👹 Play as a shapeshifting alien monster or a human survivor

  • 🧍‍♂️ Multiplayer gameplay with up to 9 players per match

  • 🧠 Deception-based mechanics: hide in plain sight, betray, survive

  • 🎧 Real-time voice chat for immersive and chaotic communication

  • 🧩 Various maps with dark, atmospheric settings

  • 🎨 Full character customization: hair, face, clothes, and more

  • 💀 Unpredictable matches: every round is different

    Will you be able to detect the monster and warn your team members? ⚠️

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Japanese, Malay, Hindi
*languages with full audio support
